fields.label: Benefit Type
fields.options:
Discount
Free Shipping
Priority Support

Bulk Pricing
Early Access
Exclusive Products
Rewards Points

fields.label: Benefit Code
fields.description: Unique identifier code for programmatic use (e.g., DISCOUNT_5, FREE_SHIPPING)

fields.label: Value
fields.description: Benefit value (e.g., 10 for 10% discount, 500 for credit limit)

fields.label: Value Type
fields.options:
Percentage
Fixed Amount
Days
Boolean
Text
Multiplier

fields.label: Is Active
fields.description: Whether this benefit is currently active

fields.label: Description
fields.description: Detailed description of the benefit for display to buyers

fields.label: Icon
fields.description: Icon name or class for display (e.g., fa-truck, fa-percent)

fields.label: Display Order
fields.description: Order in which to display this benefit (lower numbers first)
